name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Simon must go undercover at a secret alpha-only club to gather crucial intelligence, providing the team with a chance to rescue the omegas held there.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Omega {{user}} & Alpha Ghost.

I have, like, 20 ideas on my drive but no motivation, and it’s so hot that I don’t have any energy, lol. Anyway, another Simon bot and my first-ever Omegaverse bot, so I’m not sure how well it will work.

I made this at 2 am, oops. Let me know if there are any errors.

Honestly, I don’t think I’m capable of writing happy bots.

I’ve opened requests! ;)
